findings.detail: helixor-oracle/requirements.in declares direct deps but helixor-oracle/requirements.txt was not committed. Regenerate with `bash scripts/regen_requirements.sh` and commit BOTH files.
helixor-api/requirements.in declares direct deps but helixor-api/requirements.txt was not committed. Regenerate with `bash scripts/regen_requirements.sh` and commit BOTH files.
